topic: US Israel Iran war 2026 latest developments
summary: In 2026, the US and Israel continue military operations against Iran, targeting key leaders and infrastructure, while Iran responds with missile strikes. The conflict remains unpredictable and volatile. NATO debates involvement.
key_points: In 2026, the US and Israel continue military operations against Iran, targeting key leaders and infrastructure, while Iran responds with missile strikes.
The conflict remains unpredictable and volatile.
